description: Map Spotify recently played tracks to unified events timeline
sql: SELECT 'spotify' as source, track_id || '_' || played_at as source_id, played_at::TIMESTAMP as start_at, played_at::TIMESTAMP + (duration_ms * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS end_at, duration_ms / 60000.0 as duration_min, track_name || ' - ' || artists as title, NULL as description, NULL as location, 'music' as category, false as all_day, json_object('track_id', track_id, 'artists', artists, 'album', album_name, 'popularity', popularity, 'explicit', explicit) as event_metadata FROM sources.spotify__recently_played WHERE played_at IS NOT NULL
